scripts.docs:build: vitepress build && node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (!fs.existsSync('.vitepress/dist/docs')) { fs.mkdirSync('.vitepress/dist/docs'); fs.readdirSync('.vitepress/dist').forEach(f => { if (f !== 'docs') fs.renameSync('.vitepress/dist/' + f, '.vitepress/dist/docs/' + f); }); }"
